creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
The first error line:

ld: error: can't create dynamic relocation R_X86_64_32 against local symbol in readonly segment; recompile object files with -fPIC or pass '-Wl,-z,notext' to allow text relocations in the output
>>> defined in /usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/lib/libblacklist/libblacklist.a(bl.o)
>>> referenced by bl.c:294 (/usr/src/contrib/blacklist/lib/bl.c:294)
>>>               bl.o:(bl_create) in archive /usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/lib/libblacklist/libblacklist.a

Is this a WITHOUT_CLEAN build? In this tree have you tried building WITH_PIE and WITHOUT_PIE?
